name: sub
label: Sub-headline
default: Most real estate owners do not know what critical systems they have, how old they are, or which are at risk. Risk stays invisible until it becomes a loss event.

default.title: Expensive surprises
default.text: Emergency repairs, volatile insurance, and unplanned capital spend absorb margin you should never have lost.

default.title: Running blind
default.text: Boards and insurers ask for audit-ready evidence that does not exist.

default.title: Hidden financial burden
default.text: Traditional Cost of Risk misses the gaps that hit your P&L first.
